arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic boss rues touchline ban - and injury news ahead of Mansfield Town
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic boss Shaun Maloney admits he had no issue with his third booking of the campaign of the season at Cambridge on Saturday - and the accompanying touchline suspension.

arts.ttl: Ex-Wigan Athletic star credited with changing 'culture' at high-flying new club
arts.sum: Former Wigan Athletic striker Josh Magennis has played an 'amazing' part in Exeter City's rise to fifth place in League One.

arts.ttl: GALLERY: 24 of the best pics as Wigan Athletic fans travel down to Cambridge United
arts.sum: Our man Bernard Platt was in and among the crowd at the Abbey Stadium as Wigan Athletic’s supporters saw their side go down to a 2-0 defeat at Cambridge United.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wigan Athletic vs. Mansfield Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's League One clash between Wigan Athletic and Mansfield Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
